name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sweet butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the butter, granulated sugar, packed brown sugar, vanilla extract, and salt until light and creamy.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the baking powder and both flours, mixing until combined.
4. Gently stir in the chocolate chips and white chocolate chips until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
5. Scoop the batter by teaspoonfuls onto a cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 7 minutes or until golden brown.
Yield: 6 dozen cookies
